titleStmt.title: SII 29.284: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 284. (A.R. No. 37 of 1961-62.) PĀNUGALLU [Pāngal], KOLLAPUR TALUK, MAHABUBNAGAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar in front of the pond called Rāmannaguṇḍam on the hill[fort].

This record partly in Sanskrit and partly in Kannada records the construction of the temple of Mukti-Ramēśvara probably inside the hill fort of Pāngal by Dēva nārāyaṇa, the son of Simhanārāyaṇa. Dēvanārāyaṇa was then administering the fort. The record states that Simhanārāyaṇa, a brahmin belonging to Bhāradwāja gōtra hailed from Kashmira.

Regarding the date the Sanskrit portion of the record mentions rasābdhi-rāma-rāja krōdhi-nivatsare. The kannada portion mentions Śaka 1346, Krōdhi, Mārggaśira, su. 15. It corresponds to 1424 A.D., December 6, Wednesday. Lunar eclipse occured on that day but not mentioned in the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Ōṁ svasti pāyācchrī śaila pādādrīṁ
pānugallumapāyataḥ . paścimadvāra saṁcā
rō mukti rāmēśvarō mudā . bhāradvāja munīṁ
dra gōtra vilasatkāśmīra viprānvayē . jātō viṭhṭhala
nāyakō janitataḥ śrī siṁhanārāyaṇaḥ . tatputraḥ
sucaritra saṁbhṛta guṇaḥ śrī dēvanārāyaṇaḥ [.] pitr
rabdanu bēkaradgṛhamacchēḍhyaṁ mukti rāmēśi
tuḥ . rasābdhi rāmarājāṁ ke śakekōdhi
nivatsarē dēvanārāyaṇō tānnmukti rā

mēśvarālayaṁ . dvyaṁkaṁ tyaktvā tyaṁcasaṁ
khyāṁviyuktātsaṁkhyāṣa(ṣkā)dēka
mukhyāccha kābde . krōdhinyāsēnmā
rgarākāpratiṣṭhaṁ rāmēśēyaṁ
vēśmanārāyaṇāṁkāt . Avyādavyayaci
ṁnmaya śrīvardhayaḥ śrīmuktirāmēśvaraḥ .
śrī śailōttamapāda pāngalugitā durgga
vasaṁtaṁ rasāt . kāśmīraṁ gaḍiyaṁkabhī
ma birudaṁ perōja sēnā bidaṁ vidyadbā
ṁdhava biṁdhu rakṣaṇacaṇaṁ śrīdēvanārā

yaṇaṁ . bhū pāka śāsase sēvarājē
rājitirājini . sōma nāmōnmu
kti rāmēśālaya śāsanaṁ . svasti
śrī śakavarṣa 1346 krōdhi saṁvatsarada
mārggaśira su 15 siṁhanārāyaṇa
vara putra dēvanārāyaṇa durggādhīśvara
nu śrīmuktirāmēśvara śivālaya niṁ
rmāṇa māḍisidadācaṁdrārkka śrī
yō yaśaskaramakku maṁgaḷamahā śrī
śrīśrī śrīśrīśrī śrīśrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 29.284 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
